description: BRBI BR Partners S.A., through its subsidiaries, operates as an investment bank that provides investment banking, capital market, treasury sales and structuring, investment, and wealth management services in Brazil. The company offers financial and strategic advisory services for mergers and acquisitions, capital markets and solutions, boards and shareholders, Pre-IPO, and privatizations. It also originates, structures, and distributes real estate receivables certificates, structured real estate receivables certificates, agribusiness receivables certificates, real estate investment funds, inve
